landing.title: Ship SaaS faster with a production-ready starter.
landing.description: Auth, billing, storage and i18n are already wired into a monorepo package structure, so you can focus on product logic instead of scaffold work.

auth.title: Better Auth Ready
auth.description: Keep GitHub and Google OAuth enabled while sharing one auth package across apps.

billing.title: Stripe Workflows
billing.description: Subscription, lifetime and credits one-time checkout are supported through one payment catalog.

storage.title: S3 Upload Layer
storage.description: Upload API and storage package are separated, so app routes stay thin and testable.

newsletter.title: Get product updates
newsletter.description: We send release notes and template updates. No spam.
newsletter.label: Email address
newsletter.error: Failed to subscribe. Please try again.

pricing.title: Pick one payment path for each business model.
pricing.description: You asked for three payment categories. Subscription, lifetime and credits are all available via Stripe checkout.

subscription.label: Subscription
subscription.title: Pro Plan
subscription.description: Recurring access for teams that need stable monthly or yearly billing.

lifetime.label: One-time
lifetime.title: Lifetime
lifetime.description: Single payment for permanent access with no recurring invoice.

credits.label: Credits
credits.title: Credits Package
credits.description: Top up credits with one-time payment while keeping subscription optional.

billing.pageDescription: Review your active plan and jump to Stripe customer portal.
billing.title: Current Plan
billing.description: Billing status is read from the payment records synced by Stripe webhook.
